name: @pryzm/test-browser-matrix
description: PRYZM 2 — S70 D1+D5 browser-matrix CI scaffold per ADR-0052 §B.1. Playwright matrix (5 projects: chromium, firefox, webkit, edge, ipad-safari) for smoke + axe + visual-regression. Scaffold only — actual browser binaries are installed by the GitHub Actions runners; locally only the chromium project runs.
